name: Recorder History
description: Built-in recorder-backed history, analysis, and point-in-time tools.
capabilities: Reads and analyzes Home Assistant recorder history.

built_in_toggle.shared_description: Expose recorder-backed history, analysis, and point-in-time tools.
built_in_toggle.profile_disable_description: Prevents this profile from using recorder-backed history, count, duration, and point-in-time tools.
